title: Clovers
body:
Turns leaf litter into luscious clover patches!
With the pack on:
![Clover patch](https://i.imgur.com/CrVH2g4.png)
Before:
![Without texture pack comparison](https://i.imgur.com/4xVgZdR.png)

Uses the wildflower model insteaf of the leaf litter model for more depth.

For those of you who don't like the look of leaf litter in your forests.

![Another clover patch](https://i.imgur.com/YzHYAyu.png)
